name: BW LPG Limited Common Shares
summary: BW LPG Limited owns and operates a fleet of Very Large Gas Carriers (VLGCs), transporting liquefied petroleum gas (LPG) across global trade routes. Headquartered in Oslo, Norway, the company focuses on providing seaborne transportation of LPG, a vital energy source and chemical building block. They operate in the LPG shipping market, serving energy companies and commodity traders.
